prompt: I've got three LEGO sets to sell: City Police Station (set 60141, complete with box and instructions), Technic Bugatti Chiron (42083, built and then disassembled, missing about 15 pieces from memory), and Creator Expert Tower Bridge (10214, complete, no box but has instructions). Should I sell them as a bundle or separately? What should I ask?

assertions.name: bundle_recommendation_explicit
assertions.description: Output makes a clear recommendation on whether to sell as a bundle or individually (not left ambiguous)

assertions.name: incomplete_set_flagged
assertions.description: The Technic Bugatti Chiron's missing pieces are flagged and affect its pricing/handling — it is not priced as a complete set

assertions.name: prices_given_for_surviving_items
assertions.description: Prices (list/target or full listing block) are given for the items that are worth listing

assertions.name: tower_bridge_no_box_affects_price
assertions.description: The Tower Bridge set missing its box is noted and reflected in the price — it is priced below what a complete boxed set would fetch
